issue.author: XChy

comments.author: fhahn
comments.body: Should be working as expected again: https://godbolt.org/z/7fKxzqevY

issue.title: [LoopVectorize] Wrong code at -O2

tests.test_body:
target datalayout = "e-m:e-i64:64-i128:128-n32:64-S128"

define i32 @PR27246() {
entry:
  br label %for.cond1.preheader

for.cond1.preheader:                              ; preds = %for.cond.cleanup3, %entry
  %i.016 = phi i32 [ 1, %entry ], [ %inc, %for.cond.cleanup3 ]
  %e.015 = phi i32 [ poison, %entry ], [ %e.1.lcssa, %for.cond.cleanup3 ]
  br label %for.cond1

for.cond.cleanup:                                 ; preds = %for.cond.cleanup3
  %e.1.lcssa.lcssa = phi i32 [ %e.1.lcssa, %for.cond.cleanup3 ]
  ret i32 %e.1.lcssa.lcssa

for.cond1:                                        ; preds = %for.cond1, %for.cond1.preheader
  %e.1 = phi i32 [ %k.0, %for.cond1 ], [ %e.015, %for.cond1.preheader ]
  %k.0 = phi i32 [ %dec, %for.cond1 ], [ %i.016, %for.cond1.preheader ]
  %cmp2 = icmp sgt i32 %k.0, 1
  %dec = add nsw i32 %k.0, -1
  br i1 %cmp2, label %for.cond1, label %for.cond.cleanup3

for.cond.cleanup3:                                ; preds = %for.cond1
  %e.1.lcssa = phi i32 [ %e.1, %for.cond1 ]
  %inc = add nuw nsw i32 %i.016, 1
  %exitcond = icmp eq i32 %inc, 49
  br i1 %exitcond, label %for.cond.cleanup, label %for.cond1.preheader
}

define ptr @both(ptr %p, i32 %k) {
entry:
  %base = getelementptr inbounds i32, ptr %p, i64 1
  br label %for.body

for.body:                                         ; preds = %for.body, %entry
  %inc.phi = phi i32 [ 0, %entry ], [ %inc, %for.body ]
  %inc.lag1 = phi ptr [ %base, %entry ], [ %tmp, %for.body ]
  %inc.lag2 = phi ptr [ %base, %entry ], [ %inc.lag1, %for.body ]
  %tmp = getelementptr inbounds i32, ptr %inc.lag1, i64 1
  %inc = add nsw i32 %inc.phi, 1
  %cmp = icmp eq i32 %inc, %k
  br i1 %cmp, label %for.end, label %for.body

for.end:                                          ; preds = %for.body
  ret ptr %inc.lag1
}
